case_title: EEOC / iTutorGroup automated hiring discrimination matter
current_best_public_record: EEOC filing press release plus EEOC settlement/decree press release
exact_hardening_move: Capture one open court-facing complaint, consent decree, docket entry, or judicial order from an open public source or clearly labeled open mirror.
expected_paper_readiness_gain: Highest: converts the sharpest remaining agency-summary-only U.S. row into a true court/public-record anchor and strengthens employment/HR contestability claims.
claim_boundary: Do not present EEOC allegations or settlement-summary terms as court-verified complaint/decree text until an open court-facing record is captured.
visualization_hook: Court-escalation gap panel; authoritative-source depth ladder; HR contestability evidence matrix

current_best_public_record: DOJ press release plus DOJ-linked indictment PDF
exact_hardening_move: Run bounded OCR or stronger image-text extraction on the captured DOJ indictment PDF page-1 caption block and promote exact caption/case-number metadata only if legible with confidence notes.
expected_paper_readiness_gain: High: upgrades the court-family package from document presence to normalized court-anchor metadata without changing accusation-stage boundaries.
claim_boundary: Do not infer or guess docket suffixes or filing metadata from the non-extractable PDF; keep charging-stage language explicit.
visualization_hook: Normalization-stage progress facet; captured-vs-extractable-PDF funnel; court-family blocker board

case_title: SEC / Delphia and Global Predictions settled AI-washing matters
exact_hardening_move: Do selective anchor extraction for exact findings and sanction language only if manuscript/table prose needs tighter quotations; no new discovery route is required for package legitimacy.
expected_paper_readiness_gain: Medium: improves quotation precision and table economy, but does not remove a live blocker because direct order text is already present.
claim_boundary: Do not let settled SEC findings stand in for cross-sector prevalence, hidden-human generalization, or judicial merits fact-finding.
visualization_hook: Settled-regulator comparator table; sanction-amount panel; posture-aware AI-washing appendix

current_best_public_record: Current package concentrated in Italy, United Kingdom, and United States
exact_hardening_move: After one sf08 hardening move lands, add one non-U.S./non-UK follow-through row tied to a public record, court-facing document, or regulator-order text.
expected_paper_readiness_gain: Medium-longer-term: improves comparative geography and dashboard credibility after the current court-family blocker is reduced.
claim_boundary: Do not expand geography by adding thin summary-only rows before the current U.S. court/public-record weakness is made explicit or reduced.
visualization_hook: Jurisdiction balance map; authority-weighted enforcement topology
